name: California DROP
notes: Official California Delete Request and Opt-Out Platform. PrivacyGuard can guide preparation, track status, and generate reminders, but this version does not auto-submit into the state portal.

name: Direct broker request template
notes: Fallback template flow for companies without a live automated adapter.

name: Privacy email workflow
notes: For companies that accept privacy requests by email, PrivacyGuard prepares a submission pack and follow-up cadence.
